case_title: NGO SENG LYAN VS MICALIDIS GEORGE et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MICALIDIS GEORGE MICALIDIS SOKRATIS KYZERIDIS CYRIAKOS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGO SENG LYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICALIDIS GEORGE MICALIDIS SOKRATIS $1,400.50 PRINCIPAL, $24.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,424.50, 134 28TH ST.#1 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94131 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
